entries.text:
Verse 26

river

"The river," i.e. Euphrates, to the border of Egypt, but not to the "river of Egypt." Cf. Genesis 15:18 yet to be fulfilled:

Verse 29

rest of

These books have perished. 1 Kings 11:29.
